data.description: IMF: Iran war threatens higher prices, slower growth for the world.
IMF SAYS WAR INCREASES CURRENT INFLATION AND MAY CAUSE LONG-TERM HIGH INFLATION EXPECTATIONS, RAISING RISK OF A STEEPER ECONOMIC SLOWDOWN.

data.title: U.S. Commercial Insurance Market Stabilizes but New Risks Reshape Buyer Strategy: Lockton Market Update
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri on March 30, 2026, the U.S. commercial insurance market is showing signs of stabilization following a period of fluctuation. Despite this, ongoing economic, geopolitical, and legal influences are leading to a transformation in risk management, requiring insurers and clients to be more precise in their strategies. This development is crucial in light of the fluctuating market conditions.

data.title: Red Cat Announces Strategic Partnership with Ukraine’s Spetstechnoexport to Advance Multi-Domain Uncrewed Systems Collaboration
data.description: A partnership has been formed between Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT) and Spetstechnoexport (STE), under Ukraine’s Ministry of Defense. Red Cat Holdings is a U.S. company specializing in advanced drone and robotic solutions for defense and national security. The collaboration aims to enhance development of unmanned and robotic systems. The announcement was made today in Salt Lake City.

data.title: Mesirow Launches Redesigned mesirow.com to Elevate Digital Experience and Access to Firm Expertise
data.description: Mesirow has recently launched a new website to further facilitate its growth, innovation, and dedication to investing in important areas. The site aims to highlight the firm's purpose-driven brand, enhance user experience, and increase engagement with clients, job seekers, media, and community partners. The launch came on March 30, 2026, in Chicago.
Invitation to Lassila & Tikanoja Plc's AGM, important details soon.

data.title: Brown Named Women In Trucking Association's 2026 Driver of the Year
data.description: Louisville, Kentucky, on March 30, 2026 - The Women In Trucking Association (WIT) has revealed that Ingrid Brown, a skilled driver and operations manager at Blackjack Express, LLC, has been selected as the recipient of the prestigious 2026 Driver of the Year Award, generously sponsored by Walmart. Brown stood out among many candidates and was honored for her outstanding contributions to the trucking industry. This award recognizes her exemplary performance and dedication to her work. Congratulations to Ingrid Brown on this well-deserved accomplishment.

data.title: Applications for the 2026-2027 ABMS Scholars Program are Now Available
data.description: An informational webinar is set for April 28, 2026 in Chicago. The American Board of Medical Specialties (ABMS) is currently open to applications for the 2026-2027 ABMS Scholars Program™. This program, spanning one year part-time, aids early-career physicians.

data.title: Gemgem Therapeutics Selected for the 2026 Cartier Women's Initiative to Expand Access to Pediatric Rehabilitation
data.description: In San Francisco on March 30, 2026, Jeklin Jeong-eun Kim, the Founder and CEO of Gemgem Therapeutics, was announced as one of the 2026 Cartier Women's Initiative fellows. This prestigious recognition highlights her dedication to enhancing the availability of pediatric rehabilitation services utilizing AI-powered, game-based therapy.

data.title: Token startup Midas secures $50M funding for instant liquidity layer in onchain yield products, led by RRE & Creandum.
data.description: A company called Midas, focusing on tokenization, recently secured funding of a significant amount in their Series A round. The funding was primarily provided by RRE and Creandum. Midas aims to expand its innovative "instant liquidity layer" technology that caters to onchain yield products. This strategic investment will assist Midas in scaling their operations and advancing their services to meet the growing demand in the market.
